name: @agiterra/bridge-tools
description: Runtime-agnostic composite functions for bridge — the orchestrator's plugin in the Agiterra Multi-Agent Toolkit. Collapses N-step orchestration dances (wire register → env-map assembly → crew launch → pane create → attach → IPC kickoff) into single function calls. Plus the BridgeHook contract that integration plugins (bridge-github, bridge-linear, etc.) implement.
author: Tim Garthwaite <https://github.com/mividtim>
